Resume Contact Me

Matheus Boscariol

Matheus is a high school student who splits his time between competitive rowing, volleyball, saxophone, and building things — games, software, and a homelab that doubles as his personal testing ground. After a $5k game jam, he co-founded his own studio to bring their game to life, on track for a 2027 release. But what really drives how he creates, learns, and solves problems? That's the part you'll want to read for yourself.

View Projects About Me

Chat++

Chat++ is a terminal-based chat app in modern C++ with a custom client-server architecture, a modular plugin system, and a crash-safe FTXUI interface — built with a Jenkins CI/CD pipeline for cross-platform delivery.

View More

System Breach

System Breach is a pixel art stealth-action game built in Unity 6 LTS, following Unit 404, a rogue android escaping the corporate facility of Everwatch. Blending stealth and action gameplay with a branching moral ending, it's being developed by Trust The Process LLC, an indie studio with a globally distributed team.

View More

Skills

Game Development

Unity · C# · Blender · FMOD · Shader Graph · Photon

Software Development

C++ · Python · x86-64 Assembly · Java · SQL · REST APIs

Web Development

Flask · HTML · CSS · JavaScript · Bootstrap

Systems & Infrastructure

Linux · Docker · Git/Github · Jenkins · Cloudflare

Projects

System Breach

A pixel art stealth-action game built in Unity 6 LTS, following rogue android Unit 404 as he escapes the corporate facility of Everwatch.

View More
Status: Ongoing

Homelab

A self-hosted infrastructure playground running containerized services, CI/CD pipelines, and secure Cloudflare-tunneled access, built to experiment with networking, orchestration, and automation.

View More
Status: Ongoing

Chat Plus Plus

A terminal-based chat app in modern C++ featuring a custom client-server architecture, a plugin system, and a crash-safe TUI, deployed via a Jenkins CI/CD pipeline.

View More
Status: Completed

Mini WC

A low-level implementation of the Unix `wc` utility built entirely in x86-64 assembly to deepen my understanding of Linux system calls and file I/O.

View More
Status: Completed

Last Ember

A fast-paced 2D survival game built in Unity/C#, featuring random events and obstacles designed to test how long you can last, with fully custom, original art.

View More
Status: Completed

Todo App

A responsive web to-do app that lets users manage, share, and synchronize task lists across multiple devices.

View More
Status: Completed
